overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a mountain trail through a pine forest, emerging onto a rocky overlook with a panoramic view of an alpine lake and surrounding peaks. The character explores the cliff edge before continuing along the ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded mountain trail between rock face and dense pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest trail between the rock wall and pine trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
steep rock wall rising immediately beside the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest
cluster of red flowers growing beside the trail
large gray rock formation among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded mountain trail enclosed by a rocky cliff face on the left and dense pine forest on the right. The path is narrow and winding, with patches of red wildflowers visible in the dappled sunlight filtering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail opening to scenic overlook with distant peaks

events.description: emerging from deep forest shade into direct sunlight as the canopy opens up
reaching the rocky outcrop at the cliff edge overlooking the valley

agents.ego_description: walking up the trail as the forest opens to reveal expansive mountain vistas ahead

entered.detail: large gray rocky mountain peak visible through the clearing trees
blue lake visible in the valley below between the mountains
large flat rock formation at the cliff edge approaching the overlook

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the character emerges from the dense forest into direct sunlight. The rocky cliff face falls away to the left while the path leads toward a rocky outcrop at the cliff edge, revealing a stunning view of an alpine lake and distant mountain peaks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with panoramic alpine lake view

events.description: character stops at the cliff edge to observe the alpine lake and mountain panorama
character turns and begins walking along the rocky ridge away from the overlook

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook admiring the alpine lake and mountains, then turning to walk along the rocky ridge

entered.detail: expansive range of rocky peaks surrounding the alpine lake
dense green forest covering the valley floor below the overlook
narrow rocky path along the cliff edge continuing along the mountain

segments.scene_description: Standing on the rocky outcrop, the character overlooks a breathtaking panoramic view of the alpine lake nestled in the forested valley below, surrounded by distant mountain peaks. After pausing to take in the view, the character turns and continues walking along the narrow rocky ridge path, with the lake now visible to the left as they proceed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, shaded forest trail that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched alpine vista. It begins along a narrow, winding path enclosed by a rocky cliff and dense pine trees, where dappled sunlight illuminates patches of red wildflowers. As the character moves forward, the forest thins and the cliff face recedes, transitioning the scene from deep shade into direct sunlight as the trail leads toward a rocky outcrop. The view then expands into a breathtaking panorama of a forested valley and a shimmering alpine lake nestled among distant mountain peaks. Finally, after a brief pause at the edge, the camera follows the character as they turn to continue along a narrow rocky ridge with the lake remaining visible to the left.
